name: cloudcityroasters-plugin

plugins.name: cloud-city-coffee
plugins.description: Order Cloud City Roasters coffee from your terminal — /coffee chats with Lando the barista, finds your bean, and preps a secure Stripe checkout.

description: Cloud City Roasters in your terminal: /coffee chats with Lando the barista, recommends a fresh-roasted bean, and preps a secure Stripe checkout (first order 10% off automatically).
